idle_events.name: Rest and Recovery
idle_events.description: Tributes take time to rest and heal their wounds
narrative_templates: {tribute} finds a relatively safe spot to rest and tend to their wounds, allowing their body to begin healing.
Taking advantage of a quiet moment, {tribute} rests and recovers some of their lost strength.
{tribute} seizes the opportunity to rest, their body grateful for the momentary respite from constant danger.

idle_events.name: Foraging
idle_events.description: A tribute searches for edible plants and berries
narrative_templates: {tribute} carefully searches the underbrush for edible plants and berries, their survival knowledge put to the test.
Moving cautiously through the forest, {tribute} forages for food, identifying which plants are safe to eat.
{tribute} spends time gathering what nature provides, hoping their knowledge of edible plants serves them well.

idle_events.name: Finding Water
idle_events.description: A tribute locates a source of clean drinking water
narrative_templates: {tribute} discovers a clear stream or pond, finally able to quench their burning thirst.
Following the sounds of running water, {tribute} finds a reliable source of clean drinking water.
{tribute} locates a freshwater source, a critical discovery that could mean the difference between life and death.

idle_events.name: Environmental Challenge
idle_events.description: Tributes deal with harsh environmental conditions
narrative_templates: The relentless heat of the arena sun beats down on {tribute}, sapping their energy and testing their endurance.
{tribute} struggles against the harsh environmental conditions, their body pushed to its limits.
Nature itself seems to conspire against {tribute} as they battle the elements in this unforgiving arena.

idle_events.name: Setting Up Camp
idle_events.description: A tribute creates a temporary shelter
narrative_templates: {tribute} constructs a rudimentary shelter, providing some protection from the elements and potential threats.
Working quickly but carefully, {tribute} builds a temporary camp, hoping it will provide safety during the night.
{tribute} creates a hiding place, balancing the need for rest against the risk of discovery by other tributes.
